general.rationale: Balanced default profile when no stronger sector materiality signal is available.

oil_and_gas.rationale: SASB-inspired weighting prioritizing emissions, transition risk, and governance oversight for extractives.

coal.rationale: Highest environmental intensity sector with elevated governance exposure.

mining.rationale: Mining requires stronger weighting on environmental footprint and community/workforce impacts.

aviation.rationale: Aviation remains emissions-heavy but also exposed to customer and workforce factors.

banking.rationale: SASB-inspired weighting emphasizes governance, conduct, risk controls, and financial inclusion over direct operational footprint.

consumer_goods.rationale: Consumer sectors carry meaningful labor, supply chain, and product responsibility exposure.

food_beverage.rationale: Food and beverage issuers face material water, sourcing, labor, and product impacts.

technology.rationale: Technology issuers tend to be governance-led because privacy, ethics, and oversight are more material than direct emissions.

software.rationale: Software businesses are typically governance-dominant with lower direct environmental footprint.
